message:
🌱 refactor: replace magic-number ms offsets with named constants (#9981)

* 🌱 refactor: replace magic-number ms offsets with named constants

Replaces 81 raw numeric millisecond literals spread across 5 files with
named constants. Raw ms literals (60000, 300000, 3600000, etc.) violate
the CLAUDE.md 'No Magic Numbers' rule introduced with PR #9719 and the
wider codebase convention (already adopted in lib/demo/cni.ts etc.).

Files changed:
- lib/unified/registerHooks.ts          (56 instances → 18 constants)
- lib/unified/demo/generators/
    registerDemoGenerators.ts           (4 instances → 4 constants)
- components/cards/workload-monitor/
    GitHubCIMonitor.tsx                 (18 instances → 10 constants)
- lib/llmd/mockData.ts                  (1 instance → 1 constant)
- components/cards/Missions.tsx         (4 instances → 4 constants)

No behavioral change — pure rename refactor.
Fixes bead scanner-beads-y62u (blamed PR #9719).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

* 🐛 fix: restore interface declarations deleted by constants insertion

Missions.tsx and GitHubCIMonitor.tsx had their interface opening
lines (interface MissionsProps/GitHubCIMonitorProps) accidentally
replaced by the constants block, leaving dangling interface body
syntax and breaking tsc compilation.

Restore both interface declarations while keeping the named
constants in place.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
